items.caption: An interior view of a modern bar with a high ceiling featuring exposed ductwork and red piping. the bar is equipped with a well-stocked back bar displaying a variety of bottles and glasses, and there are multiple taps for beer. the foreground shows a polished wooden bar counter with a row of high-backed stools, and the lighting is warm and ambient. the background reveals a spacious area with additional seating and a large window allowing natural light to enter. the overall atmosphere suggests a contemporary and inviting establishment.

A well-stocked bar with a variety of bottles and glasses neatly arranged on shelves and the counter. there are several beer taps and a cash register visible. two black bar stools are positioned in front of the counter, ready for customers. the bar has a modern design with a brick wall in the background. a person is partially visible on the right side of the image, suggesting the presence of a bartender or staff member. the lighting is bright, and the overall atmosphere appears clean and inviting.
Three wooden bar stools in a rustic kitchen setting with brick walls and natural lighting.
items.creator: Yunuen Zempoaltecatl

items.caption: Close-up of a golden beer tap with vintage design in a bar setting, adding a classic touch.
items.creator: Boris Hamer
